close_reason: Dropped the 10-line tellerLib + inlined-overlay block from turnkey's own turnkey.toolchains config (now defaulted by the module). packages.turnkey-prelude now reuses self.lib.defaultTellerRegistry / .defaultTellerLib instead of inlining the same overlaidPkgs construction. flake.nix net: 24 lines removed, 7 added.
title: Collapse turnkey's own flake.nix consumer to use module defaults
